metadata.name: chamachain
metadata.description: ChamaChain v2 — decentralized cooperative finance (savings, CHM share token, treasury, lending) on Solana

docs: ChamaChain v2 — decentralized cooperative finance on Solana.
A rotating savings circle (chama) that grows into a community treasury:
members contribute USDT, receive CHM share tokens, pool surplus into a
shared treasury, and borrow against their reputation. The treasurer is
replaced entirely by this program.

instructions.name: approve_loan
docs: Phase 1: approval is gated to the chama creator. When Phase 2 governance
ships, `execute_proposal` becomes an alternate authorized caller here.

instructions.name: initialize_protocol
docs: One-time setup: create global Config + the CHM mint (program-owned authority).

accounts.name: mint_authority
docs: PDA that owns the CHM mint authority. Holds no data.

accounts.name: usdt_mint
docs: Mock USDT mint (created off-program, 6 decimals).

instructions.name: initialize_reputation
docs: Create the caller's global reputation record (score 50).

errors.name: NameTooLong
errors.msg: Chama name exceeds the maximum length

errors.name: InvalidMemberCount
errors.msg: Member count must be between the allowed minimum and maximum

errors.name: InvalidContributionAmount
errors.msg: Contribution amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: ChamaFull
errors.msg: This chama is full

errors.name: ChamaNotActive
errors.msg: This chama is not active

errors.name: JoinWindowClosed
errors.msg: Members can only join before the first contribution cycle begins

errors.name: AlreadyContributed
errors.msg: This member has already contributed for the current cycle

errors.name: CycleNotFunded
errors.msg: Not all members have contributed for this cycle yet

errors.name: NotCurrentRecipient
errors.msg: This account is not the designated recipient for the current cycle

errors.name: AlreadyPaidOut
errors.msg: This member has already received their payout

errors.name: DeadlineNotReached
errors.msg: The cycle deadline has not passed yet

errors.name: AlreadyProcessed
errors.msg: This member has already been processed for the current cycle

errors.name: InvalidDepositAmount
errors.msg: Deposit amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InsufficientReputation
errors.msg: Reputation is below the minimum required to borrow

errors.name: ActiveLoanExists
errors.msg: Borrower already has an active loan

errors.name: ExceedsMaxLoan
errors.msg: Requested amount exceeds the borrower's maximum loan

errors.name: InsufficientLiquidity
errors.msg: Requested amount exceeds available treasury liquidity

errors.name: InvalidLoanAmount
errors.msg: Loan amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidLoanDuration
errors.msg: Loan duration is out of the allowed range

errors.name: InvalidLoanStatus
errors.msg: Loan is not in the required state for this action

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Only the chama creator can approve loans

errors.name: LoanNotDue
errors.msg: The loan is not yet due

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

types.name: Chama
docs: A rotating savings circle.

fields.name: id
docs: Creator-scoped id, lets one wallet run multiple chamas.

fields.name: contribution_amount
docs: Fixed contribution per member per cycle (USDT, 6 decimals).

fields.name: current_cycle
docs: 1-indexed cycle currently being collected.

fields.name: payout_index
docs: join_index of the next member due to receive a payout.

fields.name: contributions_this_cycle
docs: How many members have been accounted for (paid or defaulted) this cycle.

types.name: Config
docs: Global protocol configuration. One per deployment.

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority that initialized the protocol.

fields.name: usdt_mint
docs: Mock USDT mint used for all contributions and loans.

fields.name: chm_mint
docs: CHM share-token mint (mint authority is the program PDA).

fields.name: mint_authority_bump
docs: Bump for the CHM mint-authority PDA.

fields.name: amount_due
docs: principal + interest, due in full at maturity.

types.name: Member
docs: Membership record, one per (chama, wallet).

fields.name: join_index
docs: Position in the payout rotation.

fields.name: last_processed_cycle
docs: Last cycle this member contributed to or was defaulted on.

fields.name: active_loan
docs: Set to the loan PDA while a loan is outstanding.

types.name: Reputation
docs: Per-wallet reputation, shared across every chama the wallet belongs to.
This is the "connective tissue" updated by savings, treasury and lending.

fields.name: score
docs: 0..=100 score. Starts at 50.

types.name: Treasury
docs: Per-chama shared treasury that funds loans and grows on repayment.

fields.name: total_pooled
docs: Cumulative USDT deposited into the treasury.

fields.name: available_liquidity
docs: Currently lendable USDT.

fields.name: total_repaid
docs: Cumulative repayments (principal + interest), reflecting treasury growth.

fields.name: loan_count
docs: Monotonic counter used to derive loan PDAs.
